recap.intro: This week you explored two crucial areas of B2B marketing: how to effectively bring your products to market and how to accurately measure your marketing efforts.
bullets: Go-to-Market (GTM) is more than just a launch plan; it involves a long-term strategy, a short-term plan, and an ongoing motion for how customers buy.
Many B2B companies are shifting towards integrated, automated solutions, setting a new standard for speed and efficiency that customers now expect.
To truly understand what marketing works, B2B attribution needs focus on educating teams, ensuring high-quality data, and effectively using marketing technology.
Surprisingly, AI visibility rankings can be unreliable and often just 'statistical noise,' meaning a single number might not truly reflect your performance.
recap.closing: This week you learned that successful B2B marketing requires both a clear, evolving strategy for reaching customers and robust, reliable methods to measure what truly drives results.
